violations.text: The door to the outside, located downstairs, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

A dead mouse was observed on a sticky trap under the freezer. Animal carcasses must be removed at a frequency to prevent harborage conditions of pests. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

The door to the outside, located downstairs, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
The faucet of the hand-sink was observed with a leak. A plumbing system shall be maintained in food repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

The floors in the dry storage area and under the stairwell has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The food grip of the slicer observed in poor repair (spikes missing/worn down). New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in poor repair: 1) The wall behind the dish machine in the ware-washing area had a large accumulation of peeling blackened paint. This surface is no longer considered smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and/or non absorbent 2) The ceiling tiles next to the hood system were observed with tiles that are not smooth durable, or easily cleanable and damaged (water damaged observed) 3) The floor coating throughout the kitchen observed pitted/worn. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
